positive: A vibrant, retro-futuristic scene featuring stylized geometric jungle foliage and glowing bioluminescent fauna. The composition is centered and balanced, designed for a seamless repeat pattern or a single bold graphic print. Elements include stylized palm fronds forming perfect symmetry, glowing orbs resembling fireflies, and segmented, crystalline vines. The color palette must be highly saturated: deep teal, neon magenta, electric yellow, and lime green against a dark midnight blue background. Use flat graphic design techniques combined with subtle gradient airbrushing and linework to give it a modern, vintage sci-fi aesthetic. The style should evoke Art Deco meets vaporwave, with clean silhouettes and strong, high-contrast edges, perfect for screen printing on t-shirts. Vector art quality, perfect for apparel print, highly detailed.
